title: The best chin injection points. Where to inject the chin for beautiful results.
filename: The best chin injection points. Where to inject the chin for beautiful results..en.vtt
excerpt: So what we're going to do next is just do a little bit of restoration on the chin Lauren is very clear that she wants Supernatural so I don't want to do anything to augment her chin this is just literally filling in where the tiny little transitions are between different structur…

segments.text: so what we're going to do next is just do a little bit of restoration on the chin Lauren is very clear that she wants Supernatural so I don't want to do anything to augment her chin this is just literally filling in where the tiny little transitions are between different structures so when the chin moves up when the mentalis contracts you see a little Shadow here you get the mental crease there's a tiny little Shadow at the corner of the mouth this is just a little fat pad that's shrinking and if I replace the volume we will hopefully just harmonize the structure it's a simplification she doesn't need a different proportion chin and she doesn't need a particular fold treated it's just like filling it in it's a lot like what makeup does visually but we're actually doing it from underneath the skin so it should and this isn't there's a nice prognostic sign here which is if you see these little lines that are creating the definition around her chin when I pull out they basically all disappear nearly disappear so if I can do that with a little bit of filler she will get that instant sense of fresher younger but nothing else is changing so I'm going to choose an entry

point that allow me to reach right to the midline but also to the corner of the mouth so that puts me at about here foreign ermis [Music] [Applause] so the mentalis is a little muscle that pulls the chin upwards and it's resisted by this fat pad that we're about to replace so what this will do is an effect decrease the visible strength of the muscle it just dampens its activity [Music] a contraction of the mentalis is an expression if you want to understand it that babies do when they cross of course when they're relaxed they don't have any sign of that as you get older you can just get a slight sensation of an upward tin chin contraction even when it's not there

which is what this treatment will resolve [Music] so I'm just gently finding my way in and giving a little bit of product as I go because this is actually quite a sensitive space even with a cannula it's quite sensitive around here because of the mental nerve so I'm just adding little bits of volume and gently finding my way up to the mental crease so this is it this is a juvenile Ultra voluma treatment using a 25 gauge cannula in the chin softening the activity of the mentalis and replacing the Deep chin fat pad volume [Music]

[Music] thank you [Music] I'm always doing refill as I'm cleaning or massaging so I'll be looking as I lift up that there's plenty of pink excuse the flow bounce back there hopefully I'll capture that on camera foreign [Music]
